commit.message:
Add S3 handler proxy methods to Plugin

Introduce several static proxy methods in Plugin.php that delegate S3 operations to Enhancement_S3Helper: s3UploadHandle, s3ModifyHandle, s3DeleteHandle, s3AttachmentHandle, and s3AttachmentDataHandle. These methods centralize S3-related calls from the plugin, improving encapsulation and making S3 functionality accessible via the plugin class.

repos.name: GithubSiteProxyForCloudflareWorker

commit.message: first commit
Keep Running...

style(me): 调整个人页面布局和样式

优化个人页面的视觉布局，将标题改为竖排显示并调整位置
修改爱好和评价部分的样式，增加响应式设计
调整间距和字体样式以提升整体视觉效果
Update github-data.json
Update generated images and rules [skip ci]
a commit a day keeps your girlfriend away
Update github-data.json

feat(文章页): 添加文章版权信息和修订历史功能

- 新增 License.astro 组件显示文章许可协议
- 实现 PostCopyright.astro 组件包含反馈、编辑和修订历史功能
- 添加 git-history.json 存储文章提交历史数据
- 创建 git-history.ts 和 date-utils.ts 工具函数
- 更新 config.json 添加许可协议和 GitHub 编辑配置
- 修改文章页模板集成新组件
a commit a day keeps your girlfriend away
Update github-data.json
Update backup data
Update backup data
Update backup data

feat: 添加性能测试脚本与优化报告文档

- 新增 scripts/perf-smoke.py 脚本，用于自动化采集页面性能指标
- 新增 docs/performance-improvement-report-2026-04-07.md 文档，记录第一轮性能优化的详细分析、测试方法和结果

feat(about): 重构个人主页技能展示和生涯经历模块

重构技能展示区域，采用无限滚动图标和悬停显示详细信息的设计
新增生涯经历卡片，展示教育背景等信息
优化移动端布局和整体视觉样式

perf(pages): defer below-the-fold tool hydration

Switch first-round interactive tool pages from client:load to client:visible so browser work starts when the widgets are actually near the viewport.

perf(layout): scope post-only enhancement scripts

Move code folding setup off the shared grid layout and keep the ad offset observer singleton so non-post pages execute less shared runtime work.

refactor(posts): remove duplicate pageview fetch

Use the PostMeta pageview loader as the single source of truth for article stats so post pages avoid duplicate client requests and DOM updates.

fix(api): 禁用API缓存并添加时间戳防止客户端缓存

修改API响应头禁用缓存，并在客户端请求中添加时间戳参数确保获取最新数据

- 实现RSS XML解析功能
- 增强错误处理和日志记录
- 延长缓存时间至60秒

Add S3 handler proxy methods to Plugin

Introduce several static proxy methods in Plugin.php that delegate S3 operations to Enhancement_S3Helper: s3UploadHandle, s3ModifyHandle, s3DeleteHandle, s3AttachmentHandle, and s3AttachmentDataHandle. These methods centralize S3-related calls from the plugin, improving encapsulation and making S3 functionality accessible via the plugin class.
